package rulecoverage

func PositiveWaitgroupAddInsideLoop() string {
    ruleID := "waitgroup_add_inside_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`for { wg.Add(1); go func() { ... wg.Done() }() }` where `wg.Add` could be called once before the loop with the count"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
